name: Sweet Pistachio Twists
recipeIngredient: 1 package Frozen puff pastry sheets (17 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine pistachios, honey, lemon juice, cinnamon, and cloves in a bowl.
2. Unfold the thawed puff pastry on a baking sheet.
3. Roll the puff pastry into an 12-inch square, using about 1/8-inch thickness.
4. Brush the rolled pastry with melted butter.
5. Spread the pistachio filling over half of each lengthwise pastry strip.
6. Fold the unfilled half of the pastry over the filling and press down to seal.
7. Using a sharp knife, cut the twisted pastry into 3 x 3-3/4-inch strips.
8. Place the twists on a baking sheet.
9. Bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes, or until lightly browned. (Tops can be glazed or sprinkled with powdered sugar.)
10. Makes approximately 24 twists.
